query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
{{{filter}}}

| where data_scanned_bytes > ({{min_scan_gb_per_search}} * 1G)
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
| if(execution_duration_ms > 1000 * {{slow_seconds}},1,0) as slow
| if(status_message = "Finished successfully",0,1) as fail
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS
| count_distinct(query) as unique_queries,max(scanned_partition_count) as max_partitions,avg(scanned_partition_count) as avg_partitions,count_distinct(user_name) as users,sum(duration_s) as total_sec,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned,   sum(slow) as %"slow > 30s", sum(fail) as %"fail/cancelled" by user_name,query_type
//| replace (partitions,"\n",", ") as partitions
| sort bytes_scanned
| bytes_scanned / 1024/1024/1024 as scan_gb 
| total_sec / (60 * 60) as total_hours | fields -bytes_scanned,total_sec,users

| limit 200

sources.dashboardDescription: A dashboard for viewing and optimizing high scan and poor performing searches in a Sumo Logic account using Search Audit logs.
sources.panelTitle: Top Scanners: User and Query Type. Use this panel to locate the user / workload combinations that drive high scans.
